sentence_reviews.text: A state is repeatedly updated as inputs arrive, enabling temporal dependence and iterative computation.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Sequences, events & time series, Gating & multiplicative control.
